get.description: Retrieve a list of recordings associated with a specific call. The results are sorted chronologically, with the oldest recording segment appearing first in the list.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the call for which recordings are being retrieved.

anyOf.description: The length of the call recording in seconds. Null if the recording is not completed or the duration is unknown.

id.description: The unique identifier of the call recording.

anyOf.description: The timestamp when the recording began, in ISO 8601 format. Null if the recording hasn't started or the start time is unknown.
The current status of the call recording.
The file type of the call recording. Null if the type is not specified or is unknown.
The URL where the call recording can be accessed or downloaded. Null if the URL is not available or the recording is not accessible.

get.description: Fetch a paginated list of calls associated with a specific Quo number and another number.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the Quo number associated with the call.
The unique identifier of the Quo user who either placed or received the call. Defaults to the workspace owner.

The phone numbers of participants involved in the call conversation, excluding your Quo number. Each number should contain the country code and conform to the E.164 format. Currently limited to one-to-one (1:1) conversations only.
DEPRECATED, use "createdAfter" or "createdBefore" instead. "since" incorrectly behaves as "createdBefore" and will be removed in an upcoming release.
Filter results to only include calls created after the specified date and time, in ISO 8601 format.
Filter results to only include calls created before the specified date and time, in ISO 8601 format.
Maximum number of results to return per page.

anyOf.description: The timestamp when the call was answered in ISO 8601 format. Null if the call was not answered.
The unique identifier of the Quo user who answered the incoming call. Null for outgoing calls or unanswered incoming calls.
The unique identifier of the Quo user who initiated the outgoing call. Null for incoming calls.

direction.description: The direction of the call relative to the Quo number.

status.description: The current status of the call.

anyOf.description: The timestamp when the call ended, in ISO 8601 format. Null if the call is ongoing or was not completed.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the call record was created, in ISO 8601 format.

anyOf.description: How the call reached the user's inbox: either by direct dial to their number or routed through a phone menu. Null for outbound calls.

duration.description: The total duration of the call in seconds.

anyOf.description: The phone number or Quo user ID from which the call was forwarded. Null if the call was not forwarded.
A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.
The phone number or Quo user ID to which the call was forwarded. Null if the call was not forwarded.
A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.
Type of AI that answered the call. Set to 'ai-agent' for AI responses, or null for human responses.

id.description: The unique identifier of the call.

phoneNumberId.description: The unique identifier of the Quo number associated with the call.

items.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

anyOf.description: The timestamp when the call record was last updated, in ISO 8601 format. Null if never updated.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the Quo user account associated with the call.

totalItems.description: Total number of items available. ⚠️ Note: `totalItems` is not accurately returning the total number of items that can be paginated. We are working on fixing this issue.

get.description: Get a call by its unique identifier.

schema.description: Unique identifier of the call.

anyOf.description: The timestamp when the call was answered in ISO 8601 format. Null if the call was not answered.
The unique identifier of the Quo user who answered the incoming call. Null for outgoing calls or unanswered incoming calls.
The unique identifier of the Quo user who initiated the outgoing call. Null for incoming calls.

direction.description: The direction of the call relative to the Quo number.

status.description: The current status of the call.

anyOf.description: The timestamp when the call ended, in ISO 8601 format. Null if the call is ongoing or was not completed.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the call record was created, in ISO 8601 format.

anyOf.description: How the call reached the user's inbox: either by direct dial to their number or routed through a phone menu. Null for outbound calls.

duration.description: The total duration of the call in seconds.

anyOf.description: The phone number or Quo user ID from which the call was forwarded. Null if the call was not forwarded.
A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.
The phone number or Quo user ID to which the call was forwarded. Null if the call was not forwarded.
A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.
Type of AI that answered the call. Set to 'ai-agent' for AI responses, or null for human responses.

id.description: The unique identifier of the call.

phoneNumberId.description: The unique identifier of the Quo number associated with the call.

items.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

anyOf.description: The timestamp when the call record was last updated, in ISO 8601 format. Null if never updated.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the Quo user account associated with the call.

get.summary: Get a summary for a call
get.description: Retrieve a detailed summary of a specific call identified by its unique call ID. This endpoint supports summaries for both regular calls and calls handled by Sona. Call summaries are only available on business and scale plans.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the call associated with the summary.

callId.description: The unique identifier of the call to which this summary belongs.

status.description: The status of the call summary.

get.summary: Get a transcription for a call
get.description: Retrieve a detailed transcript of a specific call identified by its unique call ID. This endpoint supports transcripts for both regular calls and calls handled by Sona. Call transcripts are only available on business and scale plans.

schema.description: Unique identifier of the call associated with this transcript.

callId.description: The unique identifier of the call to which this transcript belongs.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the transcription was created, in ISO 8601 format.

content.description: The transcribed text of a specific dialogue segment.

start.description: The start time of the dialogue segment in seconds, relative to the beginning of the call.

end.description: The end time of the dialogue segment in seconds, relative to the beginning of the call.

anyOf.description: The phone number of the participant who spoke during this dialogue segment.
The unique identifier of the Quo user who spoke during this dialogue segment. Null for external participants or if user identification is not available.

duration.description: The total duration of the transcribed call in seconds.

status.description: The status of the call transcription.

get.summary: Get a voicemail for a call
get.description: Retrieve a voicemail associated with a specific call. Returns null data fields while the voicemail is processing in our system. Returns competed data fields when the voicemail has finished processing.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the call for which a voicemail is being retrieved.

anyOf.description: The length of the call voicemail in seconds. Null if the voicemail is not completed or the duration is unknown.

id.description: The unique identifier of the call voicemail.

anyOf.description: The transcript of the call voicemail. Null if the voicemail is not completed or the transcript is not available.
examples: Hello, this is a voicemail from John Doe.
anyOf.example: Hello, this is a voicemail from John Doe.

anyOf.description: The URL where the call voicemail can be accessed or downloaded. Null if the voicemail is not completed or the URL is not available.

status.description: The current status of the call voicemail.

get.description: Custom contact fields enhance your Quo contacts with additional information beyond standard details like name, company, role, emails and phone numbers. These user-defined fields let you capture business-specific data. While you can only create or modify these fields in Quo itself, this endpoint retrieves your existing custom properties. Use this information to accurately map and include important custom data when creating new contacts via the API.

name.description: The name of the custom contact field. This name is set by users in the Quo interface when the custom field is created.

key.description: The identifying key for contact custom field.

type.description: The data type of the custom contact field, determining what kind of information can be stored and how it should be formatted.

post.description: Create a contact for a workspace.

anyOf.description: The contact's company name.

name.description: The name for the contact's email address.

anyOf.description: The contact's email address.
The contact's first name.
The contact's last name.

name.description: The name of the contact's phone number.

anyOf.description: The contact's phone number.
The contact's role.

key.description: The identifying key for contact custom field.

value.description: Value defined for the multi select type custom field.
Value defined for the address, string, or url type custom field.
Value defined for the boolean type custom field.
Value defined for the date type custom fields.
Value for the number custom field.

createdByUserId.description: The unique identifier of the user who created the contact.

source.description: The contact's source. Defaults to `null` for contacts created in the UI. Defaults to `public-api` for contacts created via the public API. Cannot be one of the following reserved words: `openphone`, `device`, `csv`, `zapier`, `google-people`, `other` or start with one of the following reserved prefixes: `openphone`, `csv`.

sourceUrl.description: A link to the contact in the source system.

anyOf.description: A unique identifier from an external system that can optionally be supplied when creating a contact. This ID is used to associate the contact with records in other systems and is required for retrieving the contact later via the "List Contacts" endpoint. Ensure the `externalId` is unique and consistent across systems for accurate cross-referencing.

id.description: The unique identifier of the contact.

anyOf.description: A unique identifier from an external system that can optionally be supplied when creating a contact. This ID is used to associate the contact with records in other systems and is required for retrieving the contact later via the "List Contacts" endpoint. Ensure the `externalId` is unique and consistent across systems for accurate cross-referencing.
Indicates how the contact was created or where it originated from.
A link to the contact in the source system.
The contact's company name.

name.description: The name for the contact's email address.

anyOf.description: The contact's email address.

id.description: The unique identifier for the contact email field.

anyOf.description: The contact's first name.
The contact's last name.

name.description: The name of the contact's phone number.

id.description: The unique identifier of the contact phone number field.

anyOf.description: The contact's role.

id.description: The unique identifier for the contact custom field.

value.description: Value defined for the multi select type custom field.
Value defined for the address, string, or url type custom field.
Value defined for the boolean type custom field.
Value defined for the date type custom fields.
Value for the number custom field.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of contact creation in ISO 8601 format.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of last contact update in ISO 8601 format.

createdByUserId.description: The unique identifier of the user who created the contact.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of contacts. You can optionally filter the results by providing external IDs and sources. When no external IDs are provided, all contacts for the organization are returned.

schema.description: Optional list of unique identifiers from an external system used to retrieve specific contacts. When provided, the result set is limited to contacts associated with the provided `externalIds`. These IDs must match those supplied during contact creation via the "Create Contacts" endpoint. When omitted, returns all contacts for the organization. Use this parameter to cross-reference and fetch contacts linked to external systems.

items.description: A unique identifier from an external system that can optionally be supplied when creating a contact. This ID is used to associate the contact with records in other systems and is required for retrieving the contact later via the "List Contacts" endpoint. get.description: Fetch a paginated list of conversations of Quo conversations. Can be filtered by user and/or phone numbers. Defaults to all conversations in the Quo organization. Results are returned in descending order based on the most recent conversation.

schema.description: DEPRECATED, use `phoneNumbers` instead. If both `phoneNumber` and `phoneNumbers` are provided, `phoneNumbers` will be used. Filters results to only include conversations with the specified Quo phone number. Can be either your Quo phone number ID or the full phone number in E.164 format.

anyOf.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

schema.description: Filters results to only include conversations with the specified Quo phone numbers. Each item can be either an Quo phone number ID or a full phone number in E.164 format.

anyOf.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the user the making the request. Used to filter results to only include the user's conversations.
Filter results to only include conversations created after the specified date and time, in ISO 8601 format.
Filter results to only include conversations created before the specified date and time, in ISO 8601 format.
Exclude inactive conversations from the results.
Filter results to only include conversations updated after the specified date and time, in ISO 8601 format.
Filter results to only include conversations updated before the specified date and time, in ISO 8601 format.
Maximum number of results to return per page.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the user or system user the conversation is assigned to.

id.description: The unique identifier of the conversation.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the most recent activity in the conversation.
The custom name of the conversation. Will be null if no custom name is set.

items.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

phoneNumberId.description: The unique identifier of the Quo phone number associated with the conversation.

totalItems.description: Total number of items available. ⚠️ Note: `totalItems` is not accurately returning the total number of items that can be paginated. We are working on fixing this issue.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the conversation to mark as read.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the user or system user the conversation is assigned to.

id.description: The unique identifier of the conversation.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the most recent activity in the conversation.
The custom name of the conversation. Will be null if no custom name is set.

items.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

phoneNumberId.description: The unique identifier of the Quo phone number associated with the conversation.

post.description: Mark a conversation as done, removing it from the inbox without sending a message. Returns the updated conversation.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the conversation to mark as done.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the user or system user the conversation is assigned to.

id.description: The unique identifier of the conversation.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the most recent activity in the conversation.
The custom name of the conversation. Will be null if no custom name is set.

items.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

phoneNumberId.description: The unique identifier of the Quo phone number associated with the conversation.

post.description: Mark a conversation as open, returning it to the inbox without sending a message. Returns the updated conversation.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the conversation to mark as open.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the user or system user the conversation is assigned to.

id.description: The unique identifier of the conversation.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the most recent activity in the conversation.
The custom name of the conversation. Will be null if no custom name is set.

items.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

phoneNumberId.description: The unique identifier of the Quo phone number associated with the conversation.

post.description: Send a text message from your Quo number to a recipient.

content.description: The text content of the message to be sent.

phoneNumberId.description: DEPRECATED, use "from" instead. Quo phone number ID to send a message from

from.description: The sender's phone number. Can be either your Quo phone number ID or the full phone number in E.164 format.

anyOf.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.
A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the Quo user sending the message. If not provided, defaults to the phone number owner.

setInboxStatus.description: Used to set the status of the related Quo inbox conversation. The default behavior without setting this parameter will be for the message sent to show up as an open conversation in the user's inbox. Setting the parameter to `'done'` would move the conversation to the Done inbox view.

id.description: The unique identifier of the message.

items.description: A phone number in E.164 format, including the country code.

from.description: The from identifier, typically a E.164 phone number but can be a variety of formats.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the Quo phone number that the message was sent from.

conversationId.description: The unique identifier of the conversation.

direction.description: The direction of the message relative to the Quo number.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user who sent the message. Null for incoming messages.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the message was created at, in ISO 8601 format

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the message status was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

get.description: Retrieve a chronological list of messages exchanged between your Quo number and specified participants, with support for filtering and pagination.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the Quo number used to send or receive the messages. PhoneNumberID can be retrieved via the Get Phone Numbers endpoint.
The unique identifier of the user the message was sent from.

Array of phone numbers involved in the conversation, excluding your Quo number, in E.164 format. Passing a single participant will retrieve their conversation messages. Passing multiple participants will retrieve group conversation messages.
